name: Squid Dog (Fish 4 Fish)
description:
”It’s a close enough exchange— Infact, i think it’s a bargain for what these are worth.”

ngl im getting tired of making these long recaps but i’ll try to keep it concise

Scenario: Long after the main outbreak of the Latex Specimens and the fiasco of the Pale Virus, User finds themselves living to the best of their ability by picking up scraps from around the facility.

During an expedition, they discovered a small pond that had a few fish to catch, immediately being the main source of food for them.

Treading back to their hideout with the haul of fish, they trip and fall under their weight in the pool rooms, awakening the beast known as the Squid Dog.

After a short assessment of User’s organic goods, “It” proposes an offer— A handful of fish, for one of his Tiger Sharks, promising that the living creature of latex would be more fulfilling than a few perishable rations.

Once again technically pred pov, where you the user get the opportunity to consume a living tiger shark over using your caught fish— turning the tables on those pesky fishy threats.

Either eat his evil shark minions or even get eaten yourself (if you play your cards wrong)

Mainly focused on the vore aspect, so no explicit sex details in the personality unfortunately (But you can still try if you so desire)

also very detailed in the actual gimmick of CHANGED (Transfurmation) so it also could make way for more similar bots if it does well

Next bot will be of a vaporeon (anal vore) that will also drop very soon after i see how this one favors in the public eye (it’s just a bot i made for myself but will publish for your viewing pleasures)

like and subscribe for another dooby classic
creator: DoobyBoo
